detaileddescription.para: Generated from constructor MR::ChangeIsoAction::ChangeIsoAction. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in the constructed object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_ChangeIsoAction_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Downcasts an instance of MR::HistoryAction to a derived class MR::ChangeIsoAction. This is a static downcast, it trusts the programmer that the target type is correct.
